meta.description: AHVI Fitness Brain v3 — workout intelligence bank with session templates, weekly programs, body-goal rules, age-aware logic, meal linking, energy routing, and progression ladders.
authoring_notes: Use this bank for recommendation routing, not just display.
Filter order: gender -> age_band -> goal -> duration -> location -> equipment -> style -> target area -> constraints -> energy level -> meal links.
All linked meal_plan_keys are references and should exist in the nutrition bank.

cards.title: Reset
items: Thread the needle 30 sec each side

cards.title: Core Block x 3
items: Side plank knees down 15 sec each side

session_templates.title: Women — 40 Min Fat Loss + Strength Mix
Men — 50 Min Full Body Gym Strength
Universal — 60 Min Full Body Home Strength

weekly_programs.title: Women 4-Day PCOS Support Plan
rest_day_guidance: Avoid very high intensity every day
progression: Week 3: add one extra strength round

weekly_programs.title: Universal 5-Day Posture + Mobility Plan
progression: Add one extra round where possible

notes: Use glute activation + lower body sessions
Can handle more cardio and dance fitness
Best balance of strength + cardio + posture work
Strength stays important; recovery matters more
Prefer joint-friendly cardio, posture, and strength
Mobility, posture, walking, and low-impact strength first

general: Stop if you feel sharp pain
Focus on good form before increasing reps or load
Take extra rest if sleep or recovery is poor
Consult a qualified professional for injuries or medical conditions
pcos_support: Pair workouts with sleep, walking, and regular meals
Avoid extreme intensity if recovery is poor
knee_friendly: Prioritize glute strength and controlled tempo

week_3_4: Add one extra round where form stays clean
week_5_6: Move one session from 20 to 30 min

week_3_4: Increase total sets on priority goal
week_5_6: Increase volume on target area days
week_7_8: Run one strength block and one hypertrophy block

upper_body: Thread the needle 30 sec each side

weekly_programs_extended.title: Women 5-Day Glute + Fat Loss Combo
rest_day_guidance: Use one low-energy reset if needed

weekly_programs_extended.title: Women 4-Day Glute Build Weights
rest_day_guidance: Increase weights only if form is stable

weekly_programs_extended.title: Men 5-Day Upper Lower Hypertrophy
rest_day_guidance: Use posture reset between lifting days

weekly_programs_extended.title: Universal 4-Day Beginner Reset
rest_day_guidance: Use low-energy recovery on stressful days

weekly_programs_extended.title: Universal 4-Day Cardio + Strength Blend
rest_day_guidance: Use yoga day as active recovery

weekly_programs_extended.title: Women 5-Day PCOS Long-Term Structure
rest_day_guidance: Avoid all-out sessions on poor sleep days

weekly_programs_extended.title: Women 4-Day Home Strength + Yoga
rest_day_guidance: Pair strength days with better protein intake

weekly_programs_extended.title: Men 4-Day Compact Home + Gym
rest_day_guidance: Use one recovery day after hard lifting

notes: If goal is pcos_support, prioritize low_impact + walking + strength over HIIT.
If age band is 45_54 or 55_plus, downrank high-impact and up-rank posture, mobility, low-impact, and walking.
If location is hotel_room, prefer hotel-friendly or no-equipment templates.
If energy level is low, prefer posture, yoga, mobility, walking, or low-impact templates.
If target area is specific but equipment/location do not support it, fall back to closest full_body or body-part home template.

next_best_expansions: Add 80–120 more session templates for better density across durations and target areas
Add rehab-safe categories only if reviewed carefully
Add pregnancy/postpartum only with clearly validated scope
Add language/tone response templates for AHVI fitness voice

Consult a qualified professional for injuries or medical conditions
